CREATE TABLE blobs_table (id INT, data BLOB);
INSERT INTO blobs_table VALUES (1, 'A'::BLOB), (2, 'DuckDB is awesome!'::BLOB), (3, 'Sample BLOB data for testing.'::BLOB);
SELECT id, to_base64(data) AS base64_data FROM blobs_table;
SELECT bt.id, to_base64(bt.data) AS base64_encoded, at.value FROM blobs_table bt JOIN additional_table at ON bt.id = at.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT to_base64((SELECT data FROM blobs_table WHERE id = 2)) AS base64_specific;
SELECT id, to_base64(data || ' extra data'::BLOB) AS extended_base64 FROM blobs_table;
SELECT (SELECT to_base64(data) FROM blobs_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) AS first_blob_base64;
WITH encoded_data AS (SELECT id, to_base64(data) AS encoded FROM blobs_table) SELECT id, encoded FROM encoded_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM blobs_table WHERE id < 3);
